content: Inventory every component that touches the database: application services (API, workers, cron jobs), analytics/ETL pipelines, dashboards, IAM roles, and any hard-coded connection strings in infra-as-code. Without a complete list, a later cutover step will silently miss a consumer.
Choose a migration strategy based on size, downtime tolerance, and Postgres version.
Execute cutover inside a maintenance window.
Post-cutover: run smoke tests and keep source warm as rollback target.
